market_pulse: Strong momentum across premium venues with David Guetta and Tiësto anchoring weekend lineups; LIV driving engagement with resident artists but facing competitive audio strategy gaps vs. XS/OMNIA.

content_gaps.description: Competitors heavily leveraging 15-30sec TikTok clips of DJ tech/booth moments; LIV producing longer-form content.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Commission 3-5 short TikTok clips per week capturing DJ booth energy and crowd moments (15-30 secs).

content_gaps.description: Bass-heavy EDM edits (#Satisfaction, #Numb remixes) trending on competitor posts; LIV posts using standard house audio.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Curate trending EDM audio library for TikTok reposts. Feature upcoming resident artists' remixes.

content_gaps.description: Hashtag campaigns (#OMNIANightclub, #HakkasanNightlife) aggregating 800K+ UGC posts; LIV Beach using #livbeach but lower UGC volume.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch weekly UGC contest: 'Tag 3 friends + #LIVNightlife for free bottle service entry.' Repost best clips to main feed.

influencer_activity.mention: Posted TikTok about Hakkasan's longevity (decade-old venue) and Tao Beach as 'best rooftop pool party in the city.'
XS/Encore promoter with 180K followers. Actively promoting guest lists and VIP table bookings for upcoming weekend events.
LIV promoter Edwin Griffiths (@LIVLV.Edwin) sharing promo codes and guest list details for Dom Dolla event; active engagement.

liv_outreach_targets.reason: High-reach EDM promoter; cross-promote upcoming LIV Beach / Nightclub events.
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_collab: Feature Cloonee, Tiësto, or Dombresky in a joint TikTok series showcasing DJ booth moments.

story_activity.summary: Instagram bio countdown to Tiësto (Sat, June 6) and Dombresky (Sun, June 7) performing. Story highlights showing Apres Beach party recap.
IG feed showcasing Tiësto (5/29), Steve Aoki (5/30), and Deseo Latin Sundays (5/31) lineups with high-engagement carousel posts.
IG Stories highlighting Kaskade (6/6) and HNTR (6/7) pool parties. Bio links to WynnNightlife.com for VIP reservations.
Newly launched dayclub (opened recently) promoting Benny Benassi (Sat) and Louis The Child (Sun) with heavy carousel content.

venues.summary: Resident artists (Tiësto, Dom Dolla, Cloonee) dominating weekend grid; strong EDC Week legacy messaging; moderate TikTok engagement.

raw_posts.content_summary: Weekly lineup grid: Cloonee (Fri 6/5), Tiësto (Sat 6/6), Dombresky (Sun 6/7). 'Meet us under the Halo' positioning.
TikTok content featuring guest list promo from @livlvguestlist with Dom Dolla event details and bottle service upsells.
User-generated content: attendees posting spring break outfits and John Summit sightings from LIV Beach.
Apres Beach party recap showing staff uniforms with Fontainebleau branding detail.

venues.summary: David Guetta (May 16) and flagship dayclub positioning; strong visual pool/tropical content; elevated engagement on carousel posts.

raw_posts.content_summary: Upcoming lineup: Linska (Fri 5/29), David Guetta (Sat 5/30), Sidepiece (Sun 5/31). 'All-new day life oasis' branding.
User clips: pool season opening day with Cloonee, attendees in swimwear, upscale cabana vibes.
EDC Week content: 'Rich in life because I'm at LIV Las Vegas for EDC' narrative-driven post about week-long party culture.

venues.summary: High-follower account (304K) with minimal recent posts; focus on outfit/dress code content; strong promoter ecosystem (Norman Jay, 180K followers).

raw_posts.content_summary: Official account: 'Where every night deserves an Encore' tagline. Limited recent event announcements; Wynn Las Vegas partnership emphasized.
Dress code/outfit content trending (user-generated): tips for nightclub attire, post-club outfit transitions.
Promoter Norman Jay (@normanjay_lasvegas) cross-promoting guest lists and VIP table service with 180K follower base.

venues.summary: Premium dayclub positioning (284K followers); weekend DJ lineup (Kaskade 6/6, HNTR 6/7) heavily featured; cabana/VIP booking emphasis.

raw_posts.content_summary: Weekend grid: Kaskade (6/6), HNTR (6/7). Located inside Wynn. Link to WynnNightlife.com for reservations.
Dayclub pool party clips: 'golden hour' photography moments, attendee testimonials about best pool experience in Vegas.
Marshmello summer pool party UGC: #Mello trending with dayclub pool background, summer vibes narrative.

venues.summary: Ultra-high reach (461K followers); aggressive weekend programming (Tiësto 5/29, Steve Aoki 5/30, Deseo Latin Sundays 5/31); Tao Group ownership driving multi-venue cross-promotion.

raw_posts.content_summary: Major lineup carousel: Justin Credible (5/26), Tiësto (5/29), Steve Aoki (5/30), Deseo Latin Sundays (5/31).
Dayclub content aggregating trending sounds; chandelier visual branding (famous OMNIA feature).
Dress code guide TikToks (user-generated): women's outfit flexibility vs. men's shoe restrictions commentary.
Venue tour/review: 'life-changing chandelier' with high-engagement music bed.

venues.summary: Dayclub positioning under Tao Group; limited independent social footprint; content folded into parent OMNIA account.

raw_posts.content_summary: Cross-promoted via OMNIA (@omnianightclub) IG stories and main feed; dayclub pool experience highlights.

venues.summary: 247K followers; trending audio strategy (bass-heavy remixes: #Satisfaction, #Numb by Illenium); active EDM/alternative music positioning; Emo Nite crossover events.

raw_posts.content_summary: Weekend lineups: The Pit w/ Bolo (Fri 6/5), The Pit w/ R.LGrime (Sat 6/6); Resorts World Las Vegas partnership.
Emo Nite x Zouk collaboration content: Underoath, Millionaires performances; niche genre positioning vs. mainstream EDM.
Illenium Linkin Park #Numb remix video: high-engagement bass-heavy audio; crossover appeal (alternative + EDM).

venues.summary: 254K followers; Tao Group legacy positioning (10-year-old venue); trending audio integration (#Satisfaction remixes); celebrity sightings (Cardi B after-party announcement).

raw_posts.content_summary: Upcoming lineup: Timmy Trumpet (6/4), EricDLux (6/5), Ty Dolla Sign (6/6). MGM Grand partnership highlighted.
Venue retrospective: 'one of the top clubs in Vegas over a decade' positioning with #Satisfaction audio and EDM branding.
Cardi B after-party announcement for 'Little Miss Drama Tour' (major celebrity traction); Hakkasan Wednesdays R&B positioning.

venues.summary: Newly launched dayclub (43 posts total, new account); strong opening momentum with Benny Benassi and Louis The Child; high-quality luxury dayclub positioning; early engagement high.

raw_posts.content_summary: Weekend grid: Benny Benassi (Sat), Louis The Child (Sun). 'Vegas' Luxury Daylife Destination' Tao Group x Palm Tree Crew branding.
Opening dayclub announcement: 'New dayclub on Vegas Strip' + MGM Grand partnership. Strong viral TikTok engagement (1.8K+ likes).

venues.summary: 96K followers; world-class DJ lineups (Tiësto, Alesso, Zedd); rooftop pool positioning (Venetian); EDC Week content heavily featured; strong influencer endorsement.

raw_posts.content_summary: Recently opened ('Now Open 🧡☀️' bio). Featuring Tiësto, Alesso, Zedd on decks throughout season. Ultramodern DJ tech emphasis.
EDC Week dayclub content: Porter Robinson, DJ Snake, Steve Aoki, Rozmus lineups. 'Best rooftop pool party in the city' TikTok content from @edsonvegasclubpromoter.
